title: crotalaria bequaertii
intro: Crotalaria bequaertii, also known as Bequaert's rattlebox, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiparasitic activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria bequaertii include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat digestive issues. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria bequaertii can be found in various forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity.
